## Description
Briefly describe what this pull request changes and why.

## Related Issue
Closes #(issue number), if applicable.

## Type of Change
- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that changes existing behavior)
- [ ] Documentation update

## Checklist
- [ ] My branch targets `develop`.
- [ ] The project compiles in the Unity Editor with no new console warnings.
- [ ] I have tested my changes in the Editor.
- [ ] I updated the README and/or CHANGELOG for user-facing changes.
- [ ] My changes do not affect runtime/builds (Chroma is Editor-only).

## Screenshots / clip
If your change is visual, add before/after screenshots or a short clip.

## Additional Notes
Anything else reviewers should know.
